prs.title: Jp/company credentials
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 84 files changed with 5470 custom lines spanning new Prisma schema models, AI data collectors, AppRunner configs, environment setup, and a suite of TODO planning docs — representing a broad architectural foundation for company credentials and related infrastructure.

prs.title: Schema Refactor: Product-centric data model, modular Prisma schema, competitive analysis & credentials
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 345 files and 19321 custom lines across a sweeping product-centric data model refactor, modular Prisma schema reorganization, competitive analysis models, credentials support, and AI agent updates from two contributors — a transformative, multi-week architectural overhaul.

prs.title: Add index for Rival.marketplaceSellerId
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A trivial single-index addition to the Rival model in the Prisma schema and corresponding migration SQL — a minimal, targeted change with no logic complexity.

stories.name: Product-Centric Data Model & Competitive Intelligence Foundation
stories.rationale: Redesigned the core data architecture around a product-centric model with modular schema, introduced company credentials and competitive analysis capabilities, and optimized marketplace seller lookups — together establishing the foundational data layer for Skematic's business readiness assessments.
